allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT hotel_id, hotel_name, city, country FROM hotels LIMIT 8;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT city, COUNT\(*\) AS hotels FROM hotels GROUP BY city ORDER BY hotels DESC;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT customer_id, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.email, c.passport FROM customers c JOIN users u USING\(user_id\) LIMIT 6;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT employee_id, u.first_name, u.last_name, e.role, h.hotel_name FROM employees e JOIN users u USING\(user_id\) JOIN hotels h ON h.hotel_id=e.works_at LIMIT 6;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT overnight_room_number, hotel_id, price, capacity, status FROM overnight_rooms LIMIT 6;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT meeting_room_number, hotel_id, hourly_rate, capacity, equipment FROM meeting_rooms LIMIT 4;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT hotel_id, service_name, charge FROM services LIMIT 8;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT reservation_status, COUNT\(*\) FROM reservations GROUP BY reservation_status ORDER BY count DESC;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT payment_type, status, COUNT\(*\) FROM payments GROUP BY payment_type, status;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT role, COUNT\(*\) FROM employees GROUP BY role ORDER BY count DESC;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT payment_type, COUNT\(*\) FROM payments GROUP BY payment_type;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT MIN\(price\), MAX\(price\), ROUND\(AVG\(price\),2\) AS avg FROM overnight_rooms;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT MIN\(hourly_rate\), MAX\(hourly_rate\), ROUND\(AVG\(hourly_rate\),2\) AS avg FROM meeting_rooms;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -p 1219 -U michael -d hotel_reservation -c "SELECT ROUND\(AVG\(rating\),2\) AS avg_rating, MIN\(rating\), MAX\(rating\) FROM reviews;")
